visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black blazer and a gold necklace, smiles excitedly at a handheld camera in a bright shopping mall with marble floors. High-contrast yellow and white text covers the lower half of the frame. (2) Close-up shots of a hand with green and white nail art trying on a silver diamond ring and several rose gold bands with hexagonal patterns inside a luxury store with warm studio lighting. (3) A static wide shot shows the golden-framed glass entrance of a BVLGARI retail store, followed by a close-up of two rings on a beige display tray. (4) The woman and a man in a black-and-white striped polo shirt stand before a gold-trimmed mirror; she holds a phone with a pink heart-patterned case to record them. (5) Close-up views of Cartier and Damiani rings being worn; the lighting is bright and even, highlighting the metallic textures. (6) The woman sits on a beige sofa in a room with an air conditioner on the wall, drinking from a white paper cup with a black 'X' logo. (7) She lifts her bare foot toward the camera, pointing at a red blister on her sole while making a pained facial expression. (8) A digital map of a city street in Korea is overlaid on the screen while she speaks directly to the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 💍璟價要結婚啦 ep.2. [Variety]: 幫我們選🥹. [Slogan]: 名牌婚戒. (2) [Subtitle]: 🇰🇷韓國準新人在台灣準備結婚 總共跑了五個婚戒品牌💎. (3) [Slogan]: 1. BVLGARI. (4) [Subtitle]: 先看了基本款，但這個還好. [Subtitle]: 結果我們一眼愛上 Serpenti Viper 系列. (5) [Variety]: INFINITO 也很美🥹 只是有點怕刮到. (6) [Slogan]: 2. Cartier. (7) [Subtitle]: 老實說我原本最期待這家... 結果最沒感覺😂 而且店員... 🤫. (8) [Variety]: 還是開心. (9) [Slogan]: 3. CHAUMET. (10) [Subtitle]: 這家的招牌是蜂巢造型 意外的好看欸😍. [Subtitle]: 這家的店員感覺很有經驗，而且超親切!. (11) [Subtitle]: 求婚用的鑽戒也美到不行~~. (12) [Slogan]: 4. Damiani. (13) [Subtitle]: 這家的招牌是『會轉的戒指』😳 但好像跟我的手不太合?. (14) [Slogan]: 5. Chopard. (15) [Subtitle]: 這家說只有一種系列 所以簡單看一下就 PASS!!!. (16) [Slogan]: 6. Boucheron. (17) [Subtitle]: 這家人太多了~ 等到最後也沒看到. (18) [Subtitle]: 買了咖啡回家討論☕. (19) [Variety]: 解渴了. (20) [Subtitle]: 公開一個 Tip 去看婚戒的時候呢 鞋子一定要穿舒服一點的 不然像我一樣... [Variety]: 剝皮辣腳. (21) [Subtitle]: 沒想到要等那麼久 也想問大家 台灣有沒有 像韓國鍾路那樣的黃金珠寶街. (22) [Subtitle]: 超級多韓國新婚夫妻去那邊買婚戒 只是價錢更便宜. (23) [Subtitle]: 有人知道資訊的話 請留言告訴我! 我想通通比較❤️.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male partner mostly shown via hands/back, 2 visible retail staff members, and approximately 4 passers-by in the background of the mall shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight black hair, wearing a professional black blazer over a black top, featuring light blue and white nail art with star patterns.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Luxury retail environments with marble floors, golden display cabinets, and high-end branding. The final segment transitions to a home interior with a beige fabric sofa, a white wall-mounted air conditioner, and a large sunflower painting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A cheerful acoustic guitar track with a steady drum beat begins. A female voice with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone speaks in Mandarin. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as the visuals cut between store signs. The music maintains a constant volume. (3) A subtle metallic click is heard as a ring is handled. The speaker's voice remains energetic. (4) A 'pop' sound effect coincides with a text graphic appearing. (5) A slurping sound of a straw is audible over the music. (6) The acoustic music continues, but the female voice's environment shifts to a quieter room with dry resonance. (7) A soft percussive 'thud' SFX occurs as she shows her foot. The speaker's tone becomes slightly more complaining yet still friendly as she asks the audience for advice.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Brand Review List (1-6) -> Life Lesson/Tip -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A lifestyle vlog documenting a Korean couple's journey shopping for high-end wedding rings in Taiwan, providing personal reviews of major brands and soliciting viewer recommendations for local jewelry districts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While multiple brands are featured, the tone is critical and personal (Vlog style) rather than a paid promotion, especially with mentions of 'passing' on certain brands and complaining about staff.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high editing frequency and social-media-native graphics to maintain high engagement throughout its shopping narrative.
